about.title: About Marouane Devise
about.content: Marouane Devise is a trusted currency exchange in Casablanca. Transparent rates, fast transactions, and a warm professional team. Travelers, students, pilgrims, or business people, we welcome you with a smile.
about.sampleReview: Fast and professional service. The rates are very competitive.
